FR-01.title: Creator Registration
requirements: Implement complete creator registration functionality

System shall maintain audit log for creator registration actions

Error messages display clearly for creator registration failures
creator registration data persists correctly across sessions

FR-01.title: Build Creator Registration API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for creator registration feature in Crowdfunding Platform. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build Creator Registration UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for creator registration. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.title: Design Creator Registration Database Schema
FR-01.description: Create database tables/collections for creator registration. Define fields, data types, constraints, indexes, and relationships. Add migration scripts.
